python3 << 'EOF'
import json, glob
arts=[]
for f in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/02/06/*.jsonl')):
    arts += [json.loads(l) for l in open(f)]
print(len(arts))
with open('memory/titles_0206.txt','w') as out:
    for a in arts: out.write(f"{a['source']} | {a['title']}\n")
EOF
grep -i -E "colombia|eln|petro" memory/titles_0206.txt | head -5; echo ---; grep -i -E "lebanon|hezbollah|tripoli" memory/titles_0206.txt | head -6; echo ---; grep -i -E "olympics|opening ceremony|milan" memory/titles_0206.txt | head -5
